notes:
v2.0.3 Update
🐛 Bug Fixes:
• Wallet App: Fixed an error when viewing sheet-linked currency balances on V14.
• Gacha App: Fixed errors when pulling gacha items and posting results to chat on V14.
• Banking App: Fixed an error when displaying or transacting sheet-linked currencies on V14.

announcement.title: 📱 Smartphone Widget v2.0.3
announcement.content:
v2.0.3 — V14 Bug Fixes

  • 🐛 Wallet App: Sheet-linked currency balance error fixed.
  • 🐛 Gacha App: Gacha pull and chat posting errors fixed.
  • 🐛 Banking App: Sheet-linked currency display/transaction error fixed.
